overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a yellow security uniform exploring a dimly lit public restroom with brown tiles, sinks, and urinals. The character walks through the space, stops to observe the urinal area, then proceeds toward a wooden exit door.

scene_state.functional_zone: public restroom entrance with sinks and stalls

agents.ego_description: walking into the restroom past the metal entrance door, moving toward the back where the urinals are located

entered.detail: metal door with push bar and silver frame at the restroom entrance
dark brown square tiles covering the walls with a lighter stripe running horizontally
white porcelain sinks mounted on the tiled wall with silver faucets
metal partition walls separating toilet stalls
white porcelain urinals mounted on the back wall
partial wall divider near the sinks

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dimly lit public restroom with brown tiled walls and floors. White sinks line the left wall while bathroom stalls are visible on the right. The character walks steadily toward the back of the room where white urinals are mounted on the wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: urinal area at the back of the restroom

events.description: character stops walking and stands still near the urinals

agents.ego_description: standing still near the white urinals, looking around the corner of the restroom

segments.scene_description: The character comes to a stop at the urinal area in the back corner of the restroom. The white urinals are now prominently visible in the foreground while the sinks and stalls fall behind. The character remains stationary, observing the surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: restroom corridor approaching the exit door

events.description: character turns around and begins walking back toward the entrance area
approaching the wooden exit door with a red sign above it

agents.ego_description: turning around and walking back through the restroom toward a wooden exit door at the opposite end

entered.detail: white porcelain sinks coming back into view on the left wall
wooden door with metal frame at the end of the corridor
red illuminated sign above the wooden door

segments.scene_description: The character turns and walks back through the restroom, passing the sinks again on the left. The camera approaches a wooden door with a red exit sign above it, indicating a transition to another area or the outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit public restroom that begins with an exploration of the interior and ends at the exit. It begins as the character enters the space, moving steadily past white sinks on the left and bathroom stalls on the right toward the back of the room. As the character reaches the far corner, the camera comes to a halt to focus on the white urinals mounted against the brown tiled walls. The scene then shifts as the character turns around and retraces their steps, passing the sinks once more. Finally, the camera moves forward toward a wooden door topped with a red exit sign, signaling a departure from the tiled room.
